calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Continued To Feb-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Avid Alavi for and with Jane E. Gershan (Petitioner/Administrator) also via Zoom.

The Court stated that it is asking that there be compliance with the probate code regarding FDIC insurance. Ms. Alavi stated that she understands that they are $100,000.00 over the limit and understands the importance of the rule, that in this case her client is the sole beneficiary and understands the risks, and that once her client is appointed that the funds will be transferred to her client's personal account. The Court stated that it is not prepared to grant until there is compliance with the probate code. Ms. Alavi requested a two-week continuance and stated that she will file a supplemental declaration.

The First and Final Report of Administrator and Petition for Approval; Petition to Dispense with Requirement of Accounting; Petition for Payment of Statutory Fees for Ordinary Services to Attorneys and for Reimbursement of Attorney's Costs; and Petition for Final Distribution and to Exonerate Bond is continued to February 8, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Cho. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
